title: Garlicky Crumbly Portuguese Cheese Bake
description: A savory, midnight-craving Portuguese cheese bake with garlicky crumbs and a splash of Shaoxing wine, perfect for a diabetic-friendly snack.

ingredients.name: Aged Azeitão cheese (or similar crumbly cheese)

instructions: In a bowl, whisk the egg, olive oil, Shaoxing wine, lemon zest, salt, and pepper to create a liquid binder.
Add the minced garlic and chopped parsley to the mixture and stir.
Fold in the almond flour to create a crumbly, low‑carb breadcrumb base.
Place the cubed cheese in a 20x20 cm baking dish and pour the binder mixture over it, ensuring all cubes are coated.
Sprinkle the remaining almond flour over the top for extra crunch.
Bake for 20‑25 minutes or until the cheese is golden, caramelized, and the crumbs are crisp.
Remove from oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve warm as a midnight snack or side.
Enjoy the garlicky, crumbly Portuguese cheese bake!
